## P8.2A recommendation

- Keep SQL operational tables as the durable source of truth.
- Use Service Bus as a distributed transport/fanout layer, not as the operational state store.
- Next implementation should harden dispatcher/executor message contracts, settlement behavior, retry behavior, and poison-message handling.
